languages.text: {n}Хохот ксеноса эхом отдается от стен, одновременно напоминая гортанный звериный лай и шипение остывающей плазмы. Ваше замешательство чрезвычайно его веселит.{/n}
{n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Хохот ксеноса эхом отдается от стен, одновременно напоминая гортанный звериный лай и шипение остывающей плазмы. Ваше замешательство чрезвычайно его веселит.{/n}

{n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}异形的笑声在墙壁间回荡，既像野兽低沉的吼声，又像冷却等离子体的嘶鸣。你的困惑令它倍感愉悦。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}异形的笑声在墙壁间回荡，既像野兽低沉的吼声，又像冷却等离子体的嘶鸣。你的困惑令它倍感愉悦。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La risa del xenos resuena por la habitación; no sabes si te recuerda a un ladrido gutural o al siseo del plasma cuando se enfría. Tu confusión le resulta fascinante.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La risa del xenos resuena por la habitación; no sabes si te recuerda a un ladrido gutural o al siseo del plasma cuando se enfría. Tu confusión le resulta fascinante.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le rire du xénos résonne dans la pièce, rappelant à la fois un aboiement guttural et le sifflement du plasma en phase de refroidissement. Il trouve votre confusion particulièrement hilarante.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rire du xénos résonne dans la pièce, rappelant à la fois un aboiement guttural et le sifflement du plasma en phase de refroidissement. Il trouve votre confusion particulièrement hilarante.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zenonun aynı anda hem gırtlaktan gelen bir hayvan havlamasına hem de soğuyan plazmanın tıslamasına benzeyen kahkahası, duvarlarda yankılanıyor. Yaşadığın kafa karışıklığını son derece eğlenceli buluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zenonun aynı anda hem gırtlaktan gelen bir hayvan havlamasına hem de soğuyan plazmanın tıslamasına benzeyen kahkahası, duvarlarda yankılanıyor. Yaşadığın kafa karışıklığını son derece eğlenceli buluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Lachen des Xenos hallt von den Wänden wider und gleicht dem Bellen eines Tieres und dem Zischen von erkaltendem Plasma. Er findet deine Verwirrung ausgesprochen amüsant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos's laughter echoes off the walls, simultaneously resembling a guttural animal bark and the hiss of cooling plasma. It finds your confusion highly amusing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異形の者の笑い声は壁に反響し、獣の唸り声と冷却されたプラズマのヒスを同時に思わせる。君の混乱は異形者に大いに面白がられている。{/n}
